creator: scrappy@hub.org
text:
the gtk13 port doesn't appear to install gdkconfig.h, which appears to be required by
gdktypes.h:

configure:7660: gcc -o conftest -O2 -I/usr/X11R6/lib/gtk-2.0/include -I/usr/X11R6/include/gtk-2.0 -I/usr/l ocal/lib/glib-2.0/include -I/usr/local/include/glib-2.0 -I/usr/local/lib/glib-2.0/include -I/usr/local/inc lude/glib-2.0 -I/usr/X11R6/include -I/usr/X11R6/include -pthread  conftest.c -L/usr/X11R6/lib -L/usr/X11R6 /lib -lgtk-x11-1.3 -lgdk_pixbuf-1.3 -lgdk-x11-1.3 -L/usr/local/lib -Wl,-E -lgmodule-1.3 -lgobject-1.3 -lgl ib-1.3 -lgiconv -lintl -lxpg4 -L/usr/X11R6/lib -L/usr/X11R6/lib -lX11 -lpangox -lpango -L/usr/local/lib -W l,-E -lgmodule-1.3 -lgobject-1.3 -lglib-1.3 -lgiconv -lXext -lX11 -lm  1>&5
In file included from /usr/X11R6/include/gtk-2.0/gdk/gdkcc.h:4,
                 from /usr/X11R6/include/gtk-2.0/gdk/gdk.h:30,
                 from /usr/X11R6/include/gtk-2.0/gtk/gtk.h:31,
                 from configure:7584:
/usr/X11R6/include/gtk-2.0/gdk/gdktypes.h:51: gdkconfig.h: No such file or
directory
configure: failed program was:
#line 7582 "configure"
#include "confdefs.h"

#include <gtk/gtk.h>
#include <stdio.h>
#include <stdlib.h>

:q
alcyone:/usr/local/kde/kdebindings# ls
/usr/X11R6/include/gtk-2.0/gdk/gdktypes.h
/usr/X11R6/include/gtk-2.0/gdk/gdktypes.h
alcyone:/usr/local/kde/kdebindings# locate gdkconfig.h
alcyone:/usr/local/kde/kdebindings# grep gdkconfig.h
/usr/ports/x11-toolkits/gtk13/pkg-plist
include/gtk-2.0/gtk/gdkconfig.h
alcyone:/usr/local/kde/kdebindings# ls
/usr/X11R6/include/gtk-2.0/gdk/gdkconfig.h
ls: /usr/X11R6/include/gtk-2.0/gdk/gdkconfig.h: No such file or directory
alcyone:/usr/local/kde/kdebindings#
